title: RESOLUTION 1 — Helmet revealed!
prompt: Medium shot in @bedroom-sisters. @Eva on the RIGHT pulls a brightly colored kids' bike helmet (pink and white with sparkly stickers) up out of the chewed package. @Sara on the LEFT, hand to mouth in surprise. @Ginger sits between them on the lower bunk, looking up. Eva (eyes huge): "It's a HELMET!" Sara (excited): "A bike helmet!" Eva (turning helmet in hands): "Whose is it?" Warm reveal lighting, sparkle effect on the helmet.
